title: The Hearth of Iron-Hold
artStyle: hand-painted graphic novel realism — realistic proportions and lighting rendered in flat painterly cel-shaded panels, bold shadows, muted cinematic palette, warm oil-paint fantasy palette
logline: On the eve of a cozy mountain festival, a dark, ash-like rot blights the winter food stores overnight. To save the clan, you must uncover a subterranean secret and appease a rumbling, ancient earth-deity sleeping deep below the stone.

characters.name: Garrick Stone-Eye
characters.visualDescription: A stocky, weathered dwarf-kin with a massive gray beard braided with bronze wire, wearing heavy wool coats over iron-plated leather armor, and sporting a polished brass eyepatch shaped like a sleeping dragon.
characters.voiceStyle: Deep, low-baritone pitch; slow and deliberate pace; extremely gravelly and chesty texture; thick, rolling Scottish-inspired highland brogue accent; frequently grunts a sharp 'Hmph!' before making a point.

characters.name: Maeve the Brewer
characters.visualDescription: A tall, wire-strong woman with sharp, bird-like features and ink-stained fingers, clad in a heavy linen apron covered in herbal stains, carrying a clinking bandolier of glowing amber vials.
characters.voiceStyle: Mid-range, dry alto pitch; fast, clipped, and precise pace; crisp, slightly raspy texture; sharp Yorkshire-style northern English accent; habitually clicks her tongue 'Tch' when expressing doubt.

characters.name: Odin of the Deep Mine
characters.visualDescription: A lanky youth with wide soot-smeared brown eyes, wearing oversized leather overalls, nervously clutching a bronze tuning fork that vibrates with a low, constant hum.
characters.voiceStyle: High-tenor, youthful pitch; rapid, breathless pace with sudden hesitant pauses; airy, trembling texture; soft, lilting West Country accent; constantly prefaces his sentences with a nervous, drawn-out 'Well, um...'.

acts.goal: Examine the sudden blight and pacify the rising panic among the suspicious clanfolk.

beats.summary: You stand inside the central granary, witnessing the first snow filter through the rafters onto mounds of ash-choked, glowing purple barley.
beats.sceneHint: A drafty, wooden granary interior at twilight. Snow flurries float through a broken skylight, landing on moldering purple crops. Maeve is kneeling, probing the rot with a knife.
choiceHints: Conceal the extent of the rot to prevent immediate panic in the streets.
Demand Garrick declare an immediate state of emergency and ration what is left.

beats.summary: The tavern is boiling with scared, shouting miners. You must gamble on a high-stakes persuasion check to calm the growing mob before they riot and destroy Maeve's lab supplies.
beats.sceneHint: A crowded, warm-lit stone tavern filled with burly workers clutching iron mugs. Shadows dance wildly from a massive stone hearth. Odin stands cowering on a table.
choiceHints: Charm them with tales of past winter triumphs to restore their faith.
Shame their cowardice and invoke the ancient law of the mountain hold.

beats.summary: You descent into the lowest coal shafts and find a massive, freshly opened fissure humming with ancient geothermal energy.
beats.sceneHint: A dark, cramped mining tunnel lit only by flickering lanterns. Dust falls from the ceiling. A deep fissure glows with a soft, pulsing violet light.
choiceHints: Drop down into the warm, rumbling fissure to find the source.
Attempt to seal the fissure with timber and mortar before the air turns sour.

qte.stakes: Hold up a collapsing support beam to escape a sudden cave-in.

beats.summary: At the outdoor mountain shrine, a colossal runestone begins to bleed dark, warm oil, melting the falling snow around it.
beats.sceneHint: A snowy outdoor cliffside at dusk. A tall, carved monolithic runestone is glistening with dark, viscous oil that steam as it hits the snow-covered ground.
choiceHints: Anoint yourself with the warm oil to attempt a psychic link with the stone.
Chip away the corrupt runes using a silver pickaxe.

acts.goal: Formulate a cure for the rot or discover the truth behind the chieftain's hidden secrets.

beats.summary: In Maeve’s workshop, you must execute a risky wit gamble to synthesize an untested antidote from glowing cave fungus, risking a laboratory explosion.
beats.sceneHint: An alchemist's lab crowded with glass coils, bubbling cauldrons, and drying herbs. Maeve holds a beaker of boiling purple liquid that flares with erratic sparks.
choiceHints: Add a volatile drop of dragon-fire oil to stabilize the reaction.
Slowly distill the mixture over a gentle, steady geothermal vent.

beats.summary: You corner Chieftain Garrick in the great hall. You must gamble on a harsh intimidation check to force him to reveal the vault keys, risking being locked in the dungeon.
beats.sceneHint: The grand high-roofed hall, lit by two enormous, roaring hearths. Garrick sits heavily on a stone throne, gripping his warhammer, looking weary and guilty.
choiceHints: Threaten to expose his family's past sins to the council of elders.
Appeal to his duty as protector of the clan's future generations.

beats.summary: You descend into the beating, molten heart of the mountain where ancient, soot-covered mechanisms are grinding to life.
beats.sceneHint: An immense underground chamber with rivers of lava and massive bronze gears. Steam hissed from iron pipes, casting dynamic, long shadows.
choiceHints: Manually override the heavy pressure valves to cool the chamber.
Jam the colossal gears with debris to stop the machine entirely.

qte.stakes: Dodge a sudden burst of pressurized, superheated steam from a ruptured pipe.

beats.summary: Crazed subterranean pests, driven mad by the rumbling mountain, swarm the outer barricades of the inner hold.
beats.sceneHint: A stone bridge leading into the fortress. Snow falls heavily. Miners in heavy coats stand behind crude wooden spikes, holding torches against scurrying shadow beasts.
choiceHints: Order the gates closed, leaving the lower farms to be overrun.
Lead a desperate counter-charge onto the narrow bridge to buy time.

acts.goal: Reignite the sacred forge, soothe the mountain beast, or flee the crumbling hold.

beats.summary: You stand before the Great Hearth of the founders. To save the hold, you must light the hearth with the last of the pure, unblighted coal.
beats.sceneHint: The deepest sanctum of the hold. A massive, cold iron hearth shaped like an open mouth. Garrick stands ready with a single glowing ember.
choiceHints: Sacrifice the remaining food reserves to stoke the purifying flame.
Use Maeve’s unstable alchemical brew to cause a massive, cleansing blast.

beats.summary: You stand face-to-face with the Earth-Heart, a colossal colossus of stone and magma waking from its millennial slumber.
beats.sceneHint: A cavernous geode chamber. A giant humanoid figure made of interlocking volcanic stone and glowing veins of orange magma rises from a lake of gold.
choiceHints: Offer your own life force to lull the ancient titan back to sleep.
Drive a runic spike directly into its molten core to shatter it forever.

beats.summary: Amidst a howling blizzard on the highest peak, the final ritual must be performed on the weeping bleeding runestone.
beats.sceneHint: A windswept mountain peak in a violent whiteout. The runestone is glowing with an intense, blinding purple aura. Maeve's hair is whipped wild by the storm.
choiceHints: Smash the runestone, releasing a shockwave that will bury the mountain in snow.
Channel the corruption into yourself to save the land below.

beats.summary: The cavern ceiling begins to rain boulders as the hold fractures. You must organize a desperate evacuation through the crumbling high passes.
beats.sceneHint: A collapsing stone hallway. Dust and heavy stone blocks crash down around escaping clanfolk. Odin is trapped under a fallen pillar.
choiceHints: Stop to free Odin, risking the lives of the fleeing elders.
Abandon the wounded and push the crowd forward into the freezing storm.
